zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理中]
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在2262.87美元附近波动，24小时变化仅为0.05%，显示出市场缺乏明确方向，处于震荡整理阶段。近期价格在2261.51至2262.92美元区间内波动，短期内难以突破该区间的上行或下行压力。

技术指标方面，MACD显示-9.04的负值，表明当前市场情绪较为疲弱，短期内可能面临卖压。RSI（14）的数据缺失使得趋势的超买或超卖信号无法确认，但从目前走势来看，市场呈现中性偏弱的格局。SMA(20)为2255.59美元，价格仍处于其之上，表明短期内有一定支撑。

支撑位方面，2261.51美元为当前价格的关键支撑点，如果突破该价位，可能会进一步测试2245美元附近的较强支撑。阻力位在2262.92美元附近，若突破该价位，则可能迎来上涨至2300美元区间。综合来看，市场波动性较小，若价格持续震荡整理，短期内观望为主。

建议交易者关注该区间的突破情况，若价格突破支撑或阻力，可考虑相应的操作。由于波动幅度有限，风险控制应严格，避免在震荡区间内频繁进出。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading nearly flat at 2262.87, with the 24h change at just 0.05%, suggesting a very quiet, range-bound session. The latest price sits slightly above the SMA(20) at 2255.59, which gives the short-term structure a mild bullish tilt. However, the extremely narrow high-low range between 2261.51 and 2262.92 shows weak volatility and limited directional conviction.

The MACD reading of -9.04 points to lingering downside momentum, even though the price is holding above its 20-period average. With RSI unavailable and the MACD signal line missing, confirmation is limited, so traders should avoid overreading a single indicator. The current setup looks more like consolidation than a strong breakout phase, with momentum still needing improvement.

Immediate support sits near 2261.50, followed by the SMA(20) around 2255.60. A clean move below that average could expose ETH/USD to deeper short-term selling pressure. Resistance is close at 2262.90, with a stronger bullish signal likely only if price breaks and holds above this tight intraday ceiling with expanding volume.

For traders, patience is important here. Aggressive buyers may consider entries only above 2263 with tight risk controls, while conservative traders may wait for a confirmed breakout or a pullback toward 2255. Short positions become more attractive if ETH loses the SMA(20), but the low volatility suggests using smaller position sizes and avoiding chasing minor moves.
